tool.name: Get Axon State
tool.description: Read current Axon app-control state snapshot.

ai.systemPromptSection:
### axon_get_state
Read current Axon native control state.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool":"axon_get_state","query":"{}"}
```
whenToUse: Need current view/bridge/tools status before invoking actions.
whenNotToUse: State is already known from immediate previous action result.
